summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Sahi Margin app - all 22 features tested and passing
test_credentials: Any email + any password. Demo: rahul@sahimargin.in / test123
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration 3 pass. Auth is mock localStorage-based. All data is hardcoded/in-memory (resets on page refresh). Key data-testids: signup-name, signup-email, signup-phone, signup-password, signup-confirm, signup-submit, toggle-lowStock, toggle-dailySummary, toggle-weeklyReport, save-product-btn, notification-bell
passed_tests: Unauthenticated redirect to /login
Login page: logo, Welcome back, email/password fields, Remember Me, Sign In, Google button, Sign up link, Trusted by 500+ Indian sellers
Sign In with any credentials navigates to dashboard
Continue with Google logs in and navigates to dashboard
Signup page: Full Name, Email, Phone +91 prefix, Password, Confirm Password, Create Account button
Valid signup navigates to dashboard (shown as Test User in sidebar)
Password mismatch shows 'Passwords do not match' error
Dashboard notification bell with red badge showing '3'
Notification bell dropdown opens with 3 notifications
Dashboard View All navigates to /orders
Sidebar collapse toggle (chevron) on desktop
Settings accessible from sidebar
Settings: 3 sections (Business Profile, Default Calculator Settings, Notifications)
Notification toggles work (Low Stock, Daily Summary, Weekly Report)
Orders platform filter tabs: All, Amazon, Flipkart, Shopify, Custom Website, Manual Entry
Amazon tab filters to show Amazon orders
Inventory Add Product button opens modal
Add Product modal fields: Name, SKU, Stock Quantity, Reorder Level, Price
Saving product adds it to inventory table (row count increases)
Logout button redirects to /login
Notification bell present on all pages
